Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, arbitrary(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__arbitrary" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/bea1db3f1b36fd6f7cea0fd8650f289de76b5897ba541b282e5423229a4fc9f7/0f41c913-8599-4f17-b139-e65a98211f5c/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
